name: Airthings ASA
summary: Airthings ASA, together with its subsidiaries, develops, produces, markets, and sells radon measurement, indoor air quality, and energy efficiency monitors worldwide. The company operates through Consumer, Airthings for Business, and Pro segments. It offers digital radon detectors, as well as smart indoor air quality monitors and solutions for homes, schools, offices, restaurants, and other commercial buildings. The company provides its products under the View Plus, Wave Plus, Wave Mini, Wave, House Kit, Home, Hub, Plus, and Pro brands. It also serves homeowners, consumers, businesses, and professionals. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
